_.name: English (en)
user.resetPasswordTokenExpired: Token is invalid or expired, please try again by requesting a new password reset link
user.accountDisabled: Your account is disabled, please contact administrator
user.sameEmailAlreadyExists: User with same email already exists
media.fileSizeTooLarge: File size too large, please upload a file less than {size}
media.fileEmpty: This file is 0 bytes, so it will not be attached.
inbox.oauthAlreadyExists: An inbox with this email already exists. Use Reconnect to update credentials.
inbox.oauthNotFound: No inbox found with this email to reconnect.
inbox.oauthEmailMismatch: The authorized email doesn't match this inbox. Please authorize with the correct account.
macro.permissionDenied: Permission denied for some macro actions
sla.firstResponseTimeAfterResolution: First response time cannot be after resolution time
conversationStatus.alreadyInUse: Cannot delete status as it is in use, Please remove this status from all conversations before deleting
csat.thankYouMessage: We appreciate you taking the time to submit your feedback.
command.selectAMacro: Select a macro to view details
command.backspaceToParent: Press Backspace to go to parent
search.noResultsForQuery: No results found for query `{query}`. Try a different search term.
search.minQueryLength: Please enter at least {length} characters to search.
search.searchBy: Search by reference number, contact email address or messages in conversations.
search.adjustSearchTerms: Try adjusting your search terms or filters.
view.form.description: Create and save custom filter views for quick access to your conversations.
view.form.name.description: Enter an unique name for your view.
view.form.filters.description: Set one or more filters to customize view.
view.form.name.length: View name should be between 2 and 30 characters.
view.form.filter.partiallyFilled: Please make sure you've filled the filter fields correctly.
account.changeAvatar: Update the image shown on your profile and conversations.
account.accountAreaDescription: Manage your profile and personal CanalGov usage preferences.
account.preferencesDescription: Define how the interface should open and which defaults should be used in your daily workflow.
account.nav.profile: Photo, visual identity, and account summary.
account.preferences.mainSidebarDescripti: Open the main navigation expanded when entering the system.
account.preferences.conversationSidebarD: Keep the conversation details panel visible when opening a conversation.
account.preferences.defaultReplyTypeDesc: Define whether the editor opens in private note or public reply mode.
account.preferences.defaultReplyChannelD: Channel automatically suggested when opening the editor.
account.preferences.enabledChannelsDescr: Choose which channels stay enabled for you in the reply area.
account.preferences.channelDescription.e: Formal e-mail reply with recipients and carbon copies.
account.preferences.channelDescription.o: Official communication based on system templates.
account.preferences.channelDescription.t: Reply through bot or Telegram integration.
account.preferences.channelDescription.s: Short channel for notifications or replies via SMS.
account.profileDescription: Manage your public account presentation and quickly review your operational assignments.
account.avatarHint: The photo shown here appears in conversations, assignments, and collaborative areas of the system.
account.avatarSecurityDescription: Prefer institutional images with good sharpness and no sensitive elements. This improves internal identification and reduces operational noise.
account.recommendedFormatDescription: Use a square image, with good lighting and centered framing. JPG and PNG work best.
account.quickActionsDescription: Shortcuts to update your profile image without leaving this page.
account.cropAvatarDescription: Adjust the framing before saving the new image.
account.availabilityDescription.online: Your account is available for live service and collaboration.
account.availabilityDescription.away: Your account is marked as away, which helps the team understand your temporary unavailability.
editor.newLine: Shift + Enter to add a new line.
editor.ctrlK: Ctrl + K to open command bar.
ai.apiKeyNotSet: {provider} API Key is not set. Please ask your administrator to set it up
ai.apiKey.description: {provider} API Key is not set or invalid. Please enter a valid API key to use AI features.
contact.blockConfirm: Are you sure you want to block this contact? They will no longer be able to interact with you.
contact.unblockConfirm: Are you sure you want to unblock this contact? They will be able to interact with you again.
contact.alreadyExistsWithEmail: Another contact with same email already exists
contact.notes.help: Add note for this contact to keep track of important information and conversations.
importer.csvMustContainHeadersAndData: CSV must contain headers and at least one data row
importer.agentCaseSensitiveNote: Roles and teams must match exactly (case-sensitive)
replyBox.channels.email.description: Ideal for replies with recipients, copy and formal track.
replyBox.channels.whatsapp.description: Useful for quick continuity of service in a conversational channel.
replyBox.channels.telegram.description: Suitable for flows with bot, group or transactional communication.
replyBox.channels.sms.description: Suitable for short messages, alerts and objective confirmations.
replyBox.channels.official.description: Formal channel for institutional responses and standardized language.
replyBox.hints.email: Open recipients only when you need to review or adjust TO, CC and BCC.
replyBox.hints.official: Preferably use a system template to maintain institutional tone and structure.
replyBox.hints.generic: The medium is recorded in the composer to guide the writing, even without changing the technical sending in this stage.
replyBox.templates.newMessageSummary: Select a saved template or write a new response.
replyBox.templates.globalTemplate: Global template available for the entire workspace.
replyBox.placeholders.privateNote: Write a private message to the team. Use {'@'} to mention people or teams.
replyBox.placeholders.reply: Reply by {channel} or select a system template.
ai.assistant.enableHandoffDescription: Allow AI assistant to hand off conversations to human agents
ai.assistant.nameDescription: The display name for this AI assistant
ai.assistant.emailDescription: Optional email address for the AI assistant
ai.assistant.productNameDescription: The name of the product this AI assistant supports
ai.assistant.productDescriptionPlacehold: Describe your product and what it does...
ai.assistant.productDescriptionDescripti: A detailed description of the product this AI assistant supports
ai.assistant.answerLengthDescription: How detailed should the AI responses be?
ai.assistant.answerToneDescription: The tone and personality for AI responses
ai.assistant.systemPromptDescription: Optional custom system prompt. Leave empty to use the default prompt.
ai.assistant.enabledDescription: Whether this AI assistant is active and can respond to inquiries
ai.assistant.deleteConfirmation: This will permanently delete the AI assistant and all its configuration. This action cannot be undone.
ai.snippet.answerPlaceholder: Enter the answer to this question...
ai.snippet.enabledDescription: Whether this snippet is active and will be used by AI assistants
ai.snippet.deleteConfirmation: This will permanently delete the snippet. This action cannot be undone.
ai.snippet.helpDescription: Private knowledge snippets for AI assistants that won't appear in your public help center.
ai.snippet.helpStep1: AI matches questions using similarity search across snippets and articles
ai.snippet.helpStep2: Most relevant content is used regardless of source
ai.snippet.helpTip1: Use for internal knowledge not suitable for public articles
ai.snippet.helpNote: Snippets and help center articles have equal priority in AI responses. The most relevant content wins based on semantic similarity to the user's question.
